description_long: This is a small, round tart-style cake topped with a generous mound of fresh raspberries. The raspberries are arranged in a slightly irregular, natural cluster, their deep red color contrasting with a light dusting of powdered sugar. The base appears to be a golden-brown pastry shell, with a creamy filling visible beneath the fruit. The surface of the raspberries is textured and slightly glossy, while the pastry has a matte, slightly rough finish. There are no visible decorations beyond the fruit, giving the cake a rustic and appetizing appearance. The cake is not displayed on any visible plate or tray, and no candles or additional adornments are present.
description: A small tart cake with a golden pastry base, creamy filling, and a mound of fresh raspberries dusted with powdered sugar. The decoration is simple and rustic, focusing on the natural beauty of the fruit.
description_view_0: The cake is seen with a prominent cluster of raspberries on top, showing the golden pastry shell and creamy filling at the base.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the depth of the raspberry pile and reveals more of the creamy filling beneath the fruit.
description_view_2: The raspberries appear densely packed, with the pastry shell and filling still visible but less pronounced.
description_view_3: The raspberries dominate the view, with the pastry shell forming a subtle base and the filling mostly obscured.
